name: @sjcrh/proteinpaint-shared
description: ProteinPaint code that is shared between server and client-side workspaces
//: all export aliases below are meant for runtime code, except for devTs-aliased subpaths

scripts.prepack: rm -rf dist && npm run build && tsc --sourcemap --skipLibCheck --preserveWatchOutput
scripts.dev: rm -rf dist && concurrently 'npm run build -- --watch' 'npx tsc --watch --skipLibCheck --preserveWatchOutput'
scripts.test-x: ls src/test/*.spec* | xargs -I % bash -c '{ tsx %; sleep 0.001; }'
